query:
-- Remove test entries
DELETE FROM players WHERE name IN ('Guest_test-device-123', 'Test-Player') OR userId = 999;

-- Check remaining players with activity
SELECT id, userId, name, totalPuzzles, accuracy, rating, completedCycles, totalTimeMs, lastActivityAt 
FROM players 
WHERE totalPuzzles > 0 
ORDER BY accuracy DESC 
LIMIT 20;
